SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
